name: firm-stack
description: Claude Code skills for accounting firms — tax return review, month-end close, reconciliation, client communications, and more.

materiality_threshold.description: Dollar amount below which Claude auto-corrects; above which it asks (e.g. 2500)

gl_system.description: Primary GL platform (Sage Intacct, QBO, NetSuite, Xero, or Other)

tax_software.description: Tax prep software (Lacerte, ProSystem, Drake, UltraTax, or Other)

capitalization_threshold.description: Dollar threshold for capitalizing vs. expensing (e.g. 2500)
